title: limonium minutum subsp. pseudominutum
intro: Limonium minutum subsp. pseudominutum, also known as Dwarf Sea Lavender, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality. The herbal preparations of Dwarf Sea Lavender include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote relaxation. Additionally, the plant's medicinal properties are thought to have a positive effect on cardiovascular health and may help to lower blood pressure.
